name: project-scaffolding
description: IDE-grade project scaffolding wizard for creating new projects with comprehensive configuration. Supports 70+ project types: HTML/CSS websites, React, Next.js, Vue, Astro, Remix, React Native, Flutter, Expo, FastAPI, Django, Express, NestJS, Go/Gin, Rust/Axum, Spring Boot, Hono, Elysia, Chrome Extensions, VS Code Extensions, Tauri desktop apps, serverless functions, and more. Provides WebStorm/PyCharm-level project creation with interactive SDK selection, framework configuration, database set...
